welcome:
👋 Welcome to {bot_name}!

Use /subscribe to receive daily reports.
subscribed: ✅ You are now subscribed to daily reports.
unsubscribed: 🔕 You have been unsubscribed. Use /subscribe to reactivate.
not_subscribed: ℹ️ You are not currently subscribed.
no_data: ⚠️ No data available yet. Check back later.
signals_daily:
📊 *Daily Signals Report — {date}*

✅ Closed: {closed_count} trades | {pips_closed} pips
🔄 Open: {open_count} trades | {pips_floating} pips floating

📅 This week: {pips_week} pips
📆 This month: {pips_month} pips

💰 Est. P&L at {lot_size} lots: ${pnl:.2f}
copy_daily:
📈 *Copy Bot Report — {date}*

💰 Your balance: ${balance:.2f}
📊 Today: {return_day_pct:+.2f}%
📅 This week: {return_week_pct:+.2f}%
📆 This month: {return_month_pct:+.2f}%
📉 Drawdown: {drawdown_month:.2f}%

💸 Floating P&L: {floating_pnl_pct:+.2f}%
funded_no_account: ℹ️ No funded account linked to your profile. Contact support.
